creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Christmas Board Party! 🎄🤩

It’s party season! 🥳 Since I still can’t join huge gatherings, our friends visited us at home for an intimate yet jolly Christmas celebration. 

Here’s a fun idea to try with your friends on your next get together: Bring your own food board! 

What we had:
• Cheese Board
• Sweet and Salty Snack Boards
• Meat (Filipino Food) Board
• Dessert Board 

Which board will you prepare? Tag your party besties! 

#ladyandhersweetescapes #ChristmasInDubai #Christmas #BoardParty #CheeseBoard #Dubai #UAE #DubaiBlogger #UAEBlogger

transcription.text: You make every day feel like it's Christmas Never wanna stop Feelin' like the first thing on your wish list Right up at the top I can't deny what I'm feelin' inside
